reviews.comment:
Valoracion Positiva, Buena Atención, muy limpio y ordenado, Valoracion negativa si no sos socio de ACA no podes estacionar, no tenes acceso a servicios sin pagar de más mucha diferencia para hoy día donde lo básico lo tienen todas las estaciones

(Translated by Google)
Positive evaluation, good service, very clean and tidy. Negative evaluation: if you are not an ACA member, you cannot park and you do not have access to services without paying more. A big difference compared to today, where all the stations have the basics.

reviewReply.comment:
Fernando , muchas gracias por tu comentario, lo tendremos en cuenta para mejorar.
te pedimos disculpas y esperamos su visita siempre.

reviews.comment:
Rayaron mi auto! Y me trato de mentiroso. Dividendo que eso Ya estava asi… incluso cuando le mostre Los restos de pintura  que quedo en el pico Del surtidor.
Estoy esperando que me den una solucion.

(Translated by Google)
They scratched my car! And he called me a liar. I'm telling you it was already like that… even when I showed him the paint chips left on the pump nozzle.

I'm waiting for a solution.

reviews.comment:
Muy lento el surtidor para cargar 65 litros una eternidad. Lo demás todo bien. Baños limpios y buen ambiente seguro ya que está lleno de gendarmes.

(Translated by Google)
The pump was incredibly slow to fill up with 65 liters; it took forever. Everything else was fine. The restrooms were clean, and the atmosphere was good and safe since there were plenty of police officers around.
